name: Data Protection Act 2018
description: UK Data Protection Act 2018 — implements UK GDPR with UK-specific provisions, including law enforcement and intelligence services processing.
relationToCloudSecurity: Applies to cloud-hosted systems within scope.
relationToAISecurity: Applies to AI systems within scope.
